prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约6537名、16891名、6247名、15724名、13506名。2022年出现异常断档（16891名），2023年迅速恢复至6247名，2024年因招生沟通不畅等舆情影响位次后移至15724名，2025年回升至13506名，近两年波动区间约13500–15700名，2025年基准约13506名；2021–2025年理科/物理类计划数分别为71人、68人、71人、72人、76人，呈小幅递增趋势；2026年计划84人，较2025年增加8人（扩招约10.5%），扩招幅度较大，理论上竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升；2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因考生反映招生电话难以联系、专业设置不合理，导致当年投档线暴跌约500名；2025年负面舆情已有所消化，位次回升；抖音热度总排名第13（高热），以食堂美食等正面内容为主，短视频曝光度较高。投档异常文件显示2024年中国农业大学为"高关注"级别；第五轮学科评估中，作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，共7个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与中国农业大学以农林为主的学科结构存在一定错位，可能影响部分高分考生选择；江西省2026年普通高考考生总数约474900人，较2025年（物理类266425+历史类206055=472480人）略有增加；省控线方面，2025年物理类本科批429分、特殊类型控制线505分，较2024年（本科批448分、特殊类型520分）有所下降，卷面难度或评分标准可能有所调整；中国农业大学位于北京市，属京校异地招生；该校在江西省招生计划占比较小（约70–80人量级），对本省考生规模变化不敏感；北京高校对江西考生整体吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13506名、2026年扩招约10.5%（推高位次数字增大）、学校软科排名持续上升至第24名（增强吸引力，推高位次数字减小）、2024年负面舆情已消化、省控线下降等因素，考虑学校排名上升和声誉恢复做小幅修正（-50名），预测2026年最低位次约14309名，波动区间13809–14809名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 6537, 16891, 6247, 15724, and 13506 respectively. An abnormal gap occurred in 2022 (16891), quickly recovering to 6247 in 2023. In 2024, due to negative public opinion such as poor admission communication, the ranking shifted back to 15724, and in 2025 it rebounded to 13506. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about 13500–15700, with a baseline of approximately 13506 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 71, 68, 71, 72, and 76 respectively, showing a slight increasing trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 84, an increase of 8 from 2025 (an expansion of about 10.5%), which is relatively large and theoretically intensifies competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 29th in 2022 → 30th in 2023 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative', mainly due to candidates reporting difficulty in contacting the admissions office and unreasonable major settings, leading to a drop of about 500 places in the admission score line that year. By 2025, the negative public opinion had been somewhat digested, and the ranking recovered. Its Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with positive content such as cafeteria food, and high short video exposure. The abnormal admission file shows that China Agricultural University was at a 'high attention' level in 2024. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering, A in Plant Protection, and A in Biology, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics and strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which somewhat misaligns with China Agricultural University's predominantly agricultural and forestry disciplinary structure, potentially affecting the choices of some high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category 266,425 + History Category 206,055 = 472,480). Regarding provincial control lines, in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 429 points and the special type control line was 505 points, a decrease from 2024 (undergraduate batch 448 points, special type 520 points), indicating possible adjustments in exam difficulty or scoring standards. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, a capital city recruiting students from other provinces. Its enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province is relatively small (about 70–80 people), making it insensitive to changes in the scale of local candidates. Beijing universities generally have strong appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 13506, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.5% (pushing the ranking number higher), the continuous rise of the university's Soft Science ranking to 24th (enhancing appeal, pushing the ranking number lower), the digestion of negative public opinion from 2024, and the decrease in provincial control lines, considering the university's ranking improvement and reputation recovery with a minor correction (-50 places), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 14309, with a fluctuation range of 13809–14809.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13809–14809, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13800), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Science Experimental Class and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 14800), you should use Tier 3 majors from the Yantai Research Institute as safety options while striving for advantageous Tier 2 majors. China Agricultural University has outstanding strengths in agricultural and forestry disciplines (7 A- or above), but overall social popularity is relatively low, making it suitable for candidates with a clear interest in agriculture, forestry, and life sciences to enter strong disciplines at a lower ranking.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科招生专业以管理类为主，社会热度分化观望；江西省2026年普通高考考生总数约474900人，历史类按近年占比（约43–44%）估算约20.4–20.9万人，较2025年（206055人）基本持平；省控线方面，2025年历史类本科批486分、特殊类型控制线539分，较2024年（本科批463分、特殊类型532分）有所上升；中国农业大学位于北京市，文科招生专业部分为烟台研究院培养（市场营销等），地域因素对报考热度有一定影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1941名、2026年缩招约18.75%（推低位次数字减小）、学校排名上升（增强吸引力）、省控线上移（竞争略加剧）等因素，缩招带来的竞争缓和已充分反映，不做额外修正，预测2026年最低位次约1723名，波动区间1465–1981名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 1907 and 1941, respectively, basically flat over two years with minimal fluctuation, with a 2025 baseline of about 1941; in 2024, the History Category plan was 4 students, increased to 16 in 2025, and planned 13 in 2026, a decrease of 3 from 2025 (a reduction of about 18.75%), a relatively large reduction, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 24th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, steadily improving overall strength; the 2024 reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative' (mainly related to science enrollment issues), with relatively limited impact on liberal arts; Douyin popularity total ranking 13th (high heat), overall exposure is high; Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Marketing, E-commerce, Public Administration, Rural Regional Development) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors are mainly management-oriented, with socially polarized and wait-and-see popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, with History Category estimated at about 204,000–209,000 based on the recent proportion (about 43–44%), basically flat compared to 2025 (206,055); in terms of provincial control lines, the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch was 486 points, special type control line 539 points, up from 2024 (undergraduate batch 463 points, special type 532 points); China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, with some liberal arts enrollment majors cultivated by Yantai Research Institute (Marketing, etc.), and regional factors have a certain impact on enrollment popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1941, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 18.75% (pushing the ranking number down), the school's rising ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the upward shift of the provincial control line (slightly intensifying competition), the easing of competition brought by the enrollment reduction has been fully reflected, with no additional correction; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 1723, with a fluctuation range of 1465–1981.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: China Agricultural University has relatively few liberal arts enrollment majors in Jiangxi Province (only 4), with rankings within the predicted range of 1465–1981; it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1500) can focus on the Rural Regional Development major cultivated at the Beijing Main Campus; rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 1900) should use Yantai Research Institute majors as a safety. Liberal arts candidates should note that some majors are cultivated by the Yantai Research Institute model (one year in Beijing + three years in Yantai), and should fully understand the cultivation plan before applying.
